name: ポイ活 発酵！ススムくん：放置ゲームで簡単ポイント稼ぎ

detail.description:
"Point-Earning Fermentation! Susumu-kun" is an easy-to-play idle clicker game where you can play by simply leaving it running or tapping!

This idle clicker game features Susumu-kun, a boy who loves pickles, making fermented foods, and you receive rewards after a certain amount of time has passed.

▼App Features
An easy point-earning game app where you can play for free, letting you make fermented foods from around the world!

Receive various gift codes to purchase your favorite items!

Just lea
